title: Global recession is inevitable if Strait of Hormuz stays shut, says Citadel's Ken Griffin
summary_full: A prolonged blockage of the Strait of Hormuz for the next six to 12 months will mean an unavoidable recession, the billionaire investor said.
summary_public: A prolonged blockage of the Strait of Hormuz for the next six to 12 months will mean an unavoidable recession, the billionaire investor said.
